# @platform/test-support

Test-support package for MSW GraphQL handlers, React Testing Library helpers, and Playwright fixtures.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/test-support
Version: 0.1.0
Component: test-support
Type: test
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: quality
Bounded context: test-support
Owner: team-quality
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: test
Class: active.test
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-quality
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own MSW GraphQL handlers and test-only data fixtures
- Provide React Testing Library helper wrappers
- Provide Playwright fixture utilities for vertical-slice validation
- Provide generic admin, staff, and user role fixtures for role-aware testing

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not ship to production runtime
- Does not own domain policy or production GraphQL transport
- Does not become an application dependency

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Import from tests only
- Use to validate React and GraphQL boundaries without production services

tests
ci
```

### Forbidden consumers

application-runtime
```
